parameters.jsCode:
const configuration = $input.first().json.configuration const options = [] const instructions = [] for (let i = 0; i < configuration.options.length; i++) { if (configuration.options[i]?.TYPE === 'INSTRUCTION') { instructions.push(configuration.options[i]) } else { options.push(configuration.options[i]) } } let price = configuration.base.List_Price+configuration.base.Surface_Finish_Price function generateOptionsHTML(options) { return options.map(option => { price = price + option['Option Price'] return `
${option.PRODUCT_OPTION_NAME}
$${option['Option Price']}
`; }).join('\n'); } const html = `
Configuration
$${configuration.base.List_Price+configuration.base.Surface_Finish_Price}
Model: ${configuration.base.Product_Name} (${configuration.base.Product_SKU})
Color: ${configuration.base.Color}
Deck: ${configuration.base.Deck_Feature}
Handing: ${configuration.base.Handing}
Installation Type: ${configuration.base.Installation_Type}
Line: ${configuration.base.Line}
Surface Finish: ${configuration.base.Surface_Finish}
$${configuration.base.Surface_Finish_Price}
Options
${generateOptionsHTML(options)}
Instructions
${generateOptionsHTML(instructions)}
Product Price
$${price}
` return { html }
